message:
fix(ci): Use correct Make target for QuickJS-NG build

Change from `make qjs` to `make` to use the default target.

The Makefile defines QJS=build/qjs (line 31) and the target is
$(QJS) (line 64), not literally "qjs". When Make can't find a target
named "qjs", it falls back to the implicit rule which tries to compile
qjs.c directly without linking, causing undefined reference errors.

The default `make` target correctly invokes CMake to build build/qjs.

files.patch:
@@ -59,7 +59,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Build QuickJS-NG
         working-directory: vendor/quickjs-ng
-        run: make qjs
+        run: make
 
       - name: Add EdgeBox and QJS to PATH
         run: |
